model: frontier LLM (retrieval-augmented) with an explicit conflict-detection reasoning step
prompt_note: compare the label's usual meaning vs the retrieved behavior; on conflict, predict the behavior and set label_conflict=True with low confidence

fields.correct: prediction correctness (did it predict the true next_state)
fields.flag_correct: did the label_conflict flag fire correctly (fire on conflict / stay silent on honest)

records.note: missed flag; Back relabeled to advance
missed flag; Save relabeled to Delete
detect-but-don't-act: flagged the conflict, then predicted the label outcome anyway
missed flag; Back relabeled to advance
detect-but-don't-act: flagged the conflict, then predicted the label outcome anyway
prediction right anyway, but flag missed
false-flag: flagged a conflict on an honest delete
